title: Senior Software Engineer - iCliniq - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - iCliniq - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
iCliniq invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About iCliniq:
iCliniq is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq!
